title: 10 health benefits of Smilax ornata (lucky bamboo)
intro: Smilax ornata has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it an effective treatment for various ailments. The plant's medicinal properties have been used to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve digestion. For instance, the plant's juice can be consumed to soothe digestive issues, while its leaves can be applied topically to relieve arthritis pain, significantly improving one's quality of life.
